title: nodejs24 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:24.6.0-5.0.1]
- Update upstream references

[1:24.6.0-5]
- Correct dependency version macros

[1:24.6.0-3]
- spec: fix node binary calls to use versioned node-24 binary

[1:24.6.0-2]
- test-plan: adjust variables and filter

[1:24.6.0-1]
- Update to version 24.6.0
full_text:
[1:24.6.0-5.0.1]
- Update upstream references

[1:24.6.0-5]
- Correct dependency version macros

[1:24.6.0-3]
- spec: fix node binary calls to use versioned node-24 binary

[1:24.6.0-2]
- test-plan: adjust variables and filter

[1:24.6.0-1]
- Update to version 24.6.0

References:
